title: polystichopsis wardii
intro: Polystichopsis wardii, also known as Ward's polystichopsis, is a plant species in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly referred to as a type of fern. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polystichopsis wardii include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. Polystichopsis wardii is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal supplements and capsules after undergoing proper processing and quality control.
